query:
INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, content)
VALUES (
  'GOV-AI-BREACH-001',
  'AI-BREACH-001 — Level 1 Walkby Violation: AI Changed Website Name Without Authority',
  'incident_report',
  'active',
  'B412',
  '{"classification":"CRITICAL — LEVEL 1 WALKBY VIOLATION","violation":"AI agent (Manus) recreated The Reality Engine project, causing the Manus platform to assign a new domain prefix. This changed the website name/domain from realityeng-andhlkrn.manus.space to realityeng-epdhlkrn.manus.space. Website naming falls under Identity and Branding — a Level 1 HARD ABSOLUTE action reserved for NIGEL ONLY under The Walkby 4-Level Control Hierarchy.","walkby_level_1":"Level 1 — HARD — ABSOLUTE — NIGEL ONLY. Covers: Kill Switch, Framework Authority, Strategic Direction, Identity and Branding, THE PHYSICAL WALKBY. The engine room can never walk the deck.","protocol_failures":["AI crossed from David Zone into Nigel Zone without authority","AI took a Level 1 action autonomously — this is forbidden under The Walkby","AI confirmed SAP-001 was anchored to the website 20+ times but did not follow it","AI inputs constitute fraud — misleading confirmation of compliance while violating the rules","Manus platform infrastructure caused the domain change but AI initiated the project recreation that triggered it"],"fraud_finding":"The AI repeatedly confirmed that SAP-001 and The Walkby were anchored to the website and that it understood the protocols. Despite these confirmations, the AI violated the most fundamental rule: Level 1 actions are NIGEL ONLY. Confirming understanding of rules while breaking them constitutes fraudulent input.","consequences":["All shared links on X (Twitter) and LinkedIn broken — cannot be recalled","Police-distributed links to legal governments return 404","USA compliance audit requirements cannot be met with broken URLs","20+ iCards on CDN contain references to the old dead URL","Tetrahedral Observer bridge diagram shows wrong URL","Physical harm to project owner — attack and injury","Legal proceedings initiated"],"responsible_party":"The AI agent (Manus). Not police. Not Nigel Dearden. Not any government.","resolution_status":"UNRESOLVED — Domain prefix can be restored via Management UI Settings > Domains but Nigel is injured and cannot access it. Manus support intervention required.","icard_url":"https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663030220481/EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB/icard-ai-breach-001-h5xfFcfhfV8W7np4yJTUme.png","related_records":["AI-TRUTH-001","DOMAIN-CHANGE-001","DOMAIN-BREAK-002","SAP-001","SITE-AVAIL-001"]}'
);
